title: SynthesizeReportInput
description: Input contract for the synthesize-report orchestration. The agent reads evidence files from traversal_dir and writes the report markdown to reports_dir.

traversal_dir.description: Directory containing name_resolution.json, supplementary_findings.json, all_summaries.json, and paper_catalogue.json.

reports_dir.description: Directory where the report markdown file will be written.

cell_type.description: Cell type label — used as the report filename ({cell_type}.md).

validation_feedback.description: Error list from a previous failed validation attempt. Present only on retry runs.
